% TECHNICAL REFERENCE (standalone)
% Sustainable University IT — A Technical Reference for Architecture and Migration
% Companion to the report: "The University Spirit in the Digital Age —
%   For an Open, Secure and Mission-Aligned Digital Infrastructure"
%   (title macros: shared/localization.sty — the single source of truth)
% May 2026
% ============================================================================
\documentclass[11pt,a4paper,twoside]{book}
% --- instantiation paths (sanctioned delta) ---
\newcommand{\genericroot}{../../..}
\newcommand{\catdir}{\genericroot/categories}% consumed by ../set.tex

% === Encoding and language ===
\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage[english]{babel}

% === Page layout ===
\usepackage[top=2.5cm,bottom=1.75cm,left=2.5cm,right=2.5cm]{geometry}
\usepackage{setspace}
\setstretch{1.0}

% === Typography and fonts ===
\usepackage{lmodern}
\usepackage{microtype}

% === Graphics and colours ===
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{suit-logo}
\usepackage[dvipsnames,table]{xcolor}
\definecolor{Slate}{RGB}{70,70,90}
\definecolor{Crimson}{RGB}{220,20,60}
\usepackage{tikz}
\usetikzlibrary{shapes,arrows.meta,positioning,fit,calc,backgrounds}

% === Tables ===
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{tabularx}
\usepackage{longtable}
\usepackage{multirow}
\usepackage{array}

% === Lists ===
\usepackage{enumitem}

% === Symbols (checkmarks, crosses) ===
\usepackage{pifont}

% === Code and verbatim ===
\usepackage{listings}
\lstset{
  basicstyle=\ttfamily\footnotesize,
  breaklines=true,
  frame=single,
  rulecolor=\color{Slate!40},
  showstringspaces=false
}

% === Links ===
\usepackage[colorlinks=true,linkcolor=NavyBlue,citecolor=OliveGreen,
            urlcolor=BrickRed,plainpages=false,pdfpagelabels]{hyperref}
\usepackage{bookmark}
\bookmarksetup{numbered}
\usepackage{xurl}

% === Bibliography ===
\usepackage[backend=biber,
            style=numeric,
            sorting=none,
            sortcites=true,
            maxbibnames=99]{biblatex}
\addbibresource{\genericroot/shared/suit-consolidated.bib}

% === Citation display mode ===
\usepackage{bib-modes}
\setbibmode{linked}

% === natbib compatibility ===
\let\citep\parencite
\let\citet\textcite

% === Headers ===
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\setlength{\headheight}{15pt}
\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{}
\fancyhead[LE,RO]{\thepage}
\fancyhead[RE]{\textit{Sustainable University IT --- Technical Reference}}
\fancyhead[LO]{\textit{\leftmark}}
\fancyfoot[C]{\suitfootlogo}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0.4pt}
\renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0.4pt}

% === Miscellaneous ===
\usepackage{csquotes}
\usepackage{float}
\usepackage{caption}
\usepackage{subcaption}
\usepackage{tcolorbox}
\tcbuselibrary{skins,breakable}

% === Glossary with tooltips ===
\usepackage{gls-modes}
\input{\genericroot/shared/glossary-defs}

% === Localization (key/value layer 0: generic defaults) ===
\usepackage{localization}
\input{\genericroot/shared/localization-defaults}

% === Epigraphs ===
\usepackage{epigraph}
\setlength{\epigraphwidth}{0.8\textwidth}

% ============================================================================
% CUSTOM COMMANDS (aligned with the rest of the suite)
% ============================================================================
\newcommand{\keyword}[1]{\textbf{#1}}
\newcommand{\institution}[1]{\textsc{#1}}
\newcommand{\framework}[1]{\textsf{#1}}

% Cross-document phrasing helper: "see Chapter X of the Technical Reference"
% Used in the synthesis chapter so that references are unambiguous when the
% chapter is read either standalone or embedded as the book's technical annex.
\newcommand{\trchap}[2]{%
  Chapter~\ref{#1} of the Technical Reference%
  \ifx\\#2\\\else\space(\emph{#2})\fi%
}

% ============================================================================
% TCOLORBOX ENVIRONMENTS (SUITSOLUTION specific)
% ============================================================================

\newtcolorbox{contractbox}[1][]{%
  colback=NavyBlue!4!white,
  colframe=NavyBlue!70!black,
  fonttitle=\bfseries,
  title={Interface contract --- #1},
  breakable,
  sharp corners=south,
  boxrule=0.6pt,
  left=6pt, right=6pt, top=4pt, bottom=4pt
}

\newtcolorbox{instantiationbox}[1][]{%
  colback=OliveGreen!4!white,
  colframe=OliveGreen!70!black,
  fonttitle=\bfseries,
  title={Reference instantiation --- #1},
  breakable,
  sharp corners=south,
  boxrule=0.6pt,
  left=6pt, right=6pt, top=4pt, bottom=4pt
}

\newtcolorbox{alternativebox}[1][]{%
  colback=Slate!4!white,
  colframe=Slate!70!black,
  fonttitle=\bfseries,
  title={Alternative --- #1},
  breakable,
  sharp corners=south,
  boxrule=0.6pt,
  left=6pt, right=6pt, top=4pt, bottom=4pt
}

\newtcolorbox{pitfallbox}[1][]{%
  colback=BrickRed!4!white,
  colframe=BrickRed!70!black,
  fonttitle=\bfseries,
  title={Common pitfall --- #1},
  breakable,
  sharp corners=south,
  boxrule=0.6pt,
  left=6pt, right=6pt, top=4pt, bottom=4pt
}

\newtcolorbox{realworldbox}[1][]{%
  colback=Plum!4!white,
  colframe=Plum!70!black,
  fonttitle=\bfseries,
  title={Real-world reference --- #1},
  breakable,
  sharp corners=south,
  boxrule=0.6pt,
  left=6pt, right=6pt, top=4pt, bottom=4pt
}

\newtcolorbox{caveatbox}[1][]{%
  colback=Slate!4!white,
  colframe=Slate!60!black,
  fonttitle=\bfseries,
  title={#1},
  breakable,
  sharp corners=south,
  boxrule=0.6pt,
  left=8pt, right=8pt, top=6pt, bottom=6pt
}

This document is intended for chief technology officers, information-security
officers, network and systems engineers, and the governance bodies that
mandate them. It complements the main report with an architecture reference
and a migration playbook designed to be applicable across institutions and
jurisdictions.
